title: Julia
description: Julia Hur is an Associate Professor of Management and Organizations at NYU Shanghai and a Global Network Associate Professor at the Leonard N. Stern School of Business at NYU. Professor Hur holds a PhD in Management and Organizations from the Kellogg School of Management at Northwestern University.
